set.body: One script: benchmark-sparse.R. Ops: spmv, spmm, sparse_crossprod. spmv and spmm already run in benchmark-regression.R but are not baselined. This ticket both rehabs the orphan and baselines the ops. Must avoid the nnz-in-join-key bug (blocked by P0 amatrix-cq0). Timer scope must exclude any CSC<e2><86><94>CSR conversion. Accuracy check: residual norm against Matrix::crossprod reference.
set.title: Rehabilitate sparse benchmark (sparse)
